chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1713 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For order on office objection. For hearing of case. 01.01.2026 Mr. Muntazir Mehdi Laghari advocate for petitioners. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, A.A.G. Sindh along with Hanif Hussain, Accounts Officer HW & SC. Mr. Hanif Hussain, Accounts Officer HW & SC is present and files statement showing the schedule for payment of the total outstanding amount of the petitioner Rs.2,705,820/-. The statement further reflects that the arrear outstanding amount of the petitioner will be cleared in five instalments from January, 2025. Learned counsel for the petitioners submits that presently petitioners are receiving the monthly pension. Respondent- Accounts Officer undertakes that future monthly pension will be paid to the petitioners regularly. It is made clear that in case of violation of statement filed today, the violator will face contempt proceedings. In view of above petition stands disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
